prompt: Design a landing page and marketing site design system for a B2B SaaS healthcare analytics platform. The audience is hospital administrators and data analysts. Professional, trustworthy, medical-appropriate aesthetic. We'll use Next.js.

assertions.name: includes_color_palette
assertions.description: Response includes professional, trust-building color palette appropriate for healthcare

assertions.name: includes_typography
assertions.description: Response specifies professional typography suitable for healthcare and data presentation

assertions.name: healthcare_compliance_aware
assertions.description: Response includes healthcare-specific design considerations (HIPAA, trust, security perception)

assertions.name: b2b_professional_tone
assertions.description: Design recommendations reflect B2B professional tone for hospital administrators

assertions.name: includes_data_visualization
assertions.description: Response includes chart/data visualization recommendations for analytics platform

assertions.name: nextjs_aware
assertions.description: Response mentions Next.js specific implementation guidance
